data.body: Create a new managed skill called refine-knot-scope. Functionally identical to the scope-refinement prompt in ~/foolery (src/lib/scope-refinement-defaults.ts): refine title, rewrite description for clarity, define/tighten acceptance criteria, keep scope unchanged. Key addition: the skill must stress that the most important outcome is the clear and concise enumeration of acceptance criteria. The skill should use {{title}}, {{description}}, and {{acceptance}} template variables and output structured JSON with title, description, and acceptance fields.
data.title: Add refine-knot-scope managed skill
